acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] `just dylint` remains canonical entrypoint
- [ ] Root workflow docs mention boundary lint gate
- [ ] Check command examples are current
description:
**Problem**
Boundary policy exists but enforcement is not consistently invoked.
design: Ensure lint command is easy to run locally and referenced as required pre-merge check.
title: Wire boundary lint into just/cargo workflow and CI docs

acceptance_criteria:
Acceptance
- import_checkpoint and import_checkpoint_export reject unsupported checkpoint_format_version with a clear error.
- All call sites consume a supported/validated meta type (compile-time enforcement).
- Tests cover: unsupported version, mismatched meta/manifest namespaces, and valid v1 import.
description:
Problem
- CheckpointMeta.checkpoint_format_version is parsed but never validated in import_checkpoint or read_checkpoint_export_at_oid.
- We can deserialize a future/incompatible format and then attempt to parse it as v1, producing undefined state.
- The invariant "only known checkpoint formats may be imported" is implicit and unchecked.

Impact
- Silent mis-parse or partial state on format upgrades.
- Compiler can't help because version compatibility is not encoded in types.
design:
Design
- Introduce a CheckpointFormatVersion enum (currently only V1) and a ParsedCheckpointMeta wrapper that is guaranteed to be supported.
- Provide a single parse entry point (e.g., CheckpointMeta::parse_supported(bytes) or CheckpointExport::try_from_blobs) that validates:
  - checkpoint_format_version is supported.
  - manifest_hash/content_hash match canonical encodings.
  - meta/manifest namespace lists are normalized and equal (fail otherwise).
- import_checkpoint / import_checkpoint_export should only accept ParsedCheckpointMeta + ParsedCheckpointManifest, so version gating is enforced by the type system.

Scatter fit
- Centralize all version+hash checks at parse boundary; downstream code should see only validated types.

Files
- crates/beads-rs/src/git/checkpoint/meta.rs
- crates/beads-rs/src/git/checkpoint/manifest.rs
- crates/beads-rs/src/git/checkpoint/import.rs
- crates/beads-rs/src/git/checkpoint/publish.rs
- crates/beads-rs/src/git/checkpoint/cache.rs
title: checkpoint import must reject unsupported format versions
